---
id: get-vrm-spring-bone
title: "Get a VRM spring bone chain"
description: "Retrieve a specific spring bone chain by its root entity ID for the specified VRM model."
sidebar_label: "Get a VRM spring bone chain"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a VRM spring bone chain"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/spring-bones/{chain_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a specific spring bone chain by its root entity ID for the specified VRM model.
